name: Format AQI message
ENS160 Demo
info:
This flow demonstrates the ENS160 digital multi-gas sensor for indoor air quality monitoring.

An inject node fires every 10 seconds, triggering the ENS160 node to read air quality. The output includes AQI (1-5 scale), TVOC (ppb), and eCO2 (ppm).

A function node formats the AQI with a human-readable label (Excellent/Good/Moderate/Poor/Unhealthy) and feeds a gauge widget showing the color-coded AQI value.

The ENS160 requires ~3 minutes warm-up after power-on before VALIDITY_FLAG reaches 0. During warm-up, the node outputs a warning with the current status.
